phoneticUs: k蓹藞r蓱藧k蓹s; k蓹藞r忙k蓹s
meaning: n.鍔犳媺鍔犳柉(濮斿唴鐟炴媺棣栭兘)
examples: Leaders of eight Latin American countries are meeting in Caracas, Venezuela, today.
IT IS a long way from Tripoli to Caracas.
They will operate in the capital Caracas and two neighbouring states - Vargas and Miranda.
Thousands of Chavez supporters took to the streets of Caracas, chanting: "We are all Chavez!"
